fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code to identify the variant.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item card from which you opened the Item Variant Translations window.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies text that describes the item variant.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item variant in more detail than the Description field.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example an item variant that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Picture
fields.tooltip: Specifies the picture that has been inserted for the item variant.

fields.name: Sales Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the item variant cannot be entered on sales documents, except return orders and credit memos, and journals.

fields.name: Purchasing Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the item variant cannot be entered on purchase documents, except return orders and credit memos, and journals.

fields.name: Service Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the item variant cannot be entered on service items, service contracts and service documents, except credit memos.
